violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of pink residue. The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine must be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent the possible contamination of foods. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
The hand sinks in the men's bathroom and the women's bathroom located near the toilets were observed with water temperature of 65-70 degrees Fahrenheit. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

The cutting surfaces of the flip top prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (scoops) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items moved to the warewashing area to be washed, rinsed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024

Milk and yogurt was observed held at 46-47 degrees Fahrenheit. Teh temperature of the unit was observed fluctuating between 41-47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were voluntarily disposed of by PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024

The following was observed: The reach-in cooler was observed fluctuating between 41-47 degrees Fahrenheit. Refrigerator to be taken out of service until it can be serviced/repaired/replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

The cutting surfaces of the flip top prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

The condensate from the front sliding door refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024
The floors under the back storage shelves have an accumulation of old rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024
